source_anchors: sustainable energy is framed as an energy-output and civilizational problem
Roadster is a high-price low-volume entry point
AC Propulsion prototype and Lotus Elise path did not translate cleanly into product
Tesla and SpaceX survival crises forced severe funding choices
Model 3 production crisis made manufacturing scale the blocking constraint
Tesla chose direct sales/service and vertical integration
cost reduction came through iteration, scale, R&D, manufacturing, and design
accident narratives and public risk perception became part of the operating environment
SolarCity is framed as integrated solar, storage, deployment, and user experience
baseline_summary_trap: Do not reduce this chapter to a celebratory Tesla summary about electric cars, saving the company, working hard, vertical integration, and solar.
upgrade_question: 一个宏大使命怎样被现实压成车型顺序、工业化证明、资金生存、制造规模、成本下降、服务体验和公众信任的连续约束链？

mechanism_graph.input: 可持续能源使命、电动车技术、早期原型和市场机会
mechanism_graph.constraint: 电池成本、原型不等于产品、现金流、量产难度、供应链、销售服务、公众认知
mechanism_graph.action: 用高价低量入口成熟技术，穿过资金和制造危机，整合关键系统，持续降低成本
mechanism_graph.feedback: 原型故障、碰撞测试、Model 3 产能、现金压力、用户体验和事故叙事
mechanism_graph.output: 从愿景到可交付交通能源系统的路线
mechanism_graph.failure_mode: 把危机动作、过劳和强控制美化成常态管理方法
mechanism_graph.boundary: 高端切入、垂直整合和危机求生都需要具体约束，不可泛化

lens_auction.reason: 能统一车型、资金、制造、成本和认知，不落入英雄叙事。
能反向解释 Roadster 路线和量产危机。
会美化过劳和危机状态。

absorb: 把使命拆成连续约束和证明阶段
区分原型、产品和量产证明
在关键环节咬合时考虑系统连续性
downgrade: 高价低量入口只是特定技术成熟阶段的策略
垂直整合只在外包会切断关键反馈时成立
公众认知战不能替代真实产品安全
reject: 把危机求生动作包装成长期组织模板
把过劳、睡工厂和强控制浪漫化
